title: Senior Product Marketing Specialist (m/w/d)
required_skills: Sales tools & content (pitch decks, battle cards, case studies)
missing_skills: Explicit product messaging / narrative writing samples
core_responsibilities: Analyse markets, competitors, and trends to identify opportunities; develop buyer personas and journeys
Define value propositions and drive go-to-market strategies for new and existing products
Develop clear product narratives and messaging across target segments
Create sales tools and content (pitch decks, battle cards, case studies)
Enable Sales teams through training, materials, and cross-functional collaboration with Product Management
recommended_emphasis: Highlight GTM strategy execution with measurable outcomes (e.g., 24% CAC reduction at Futu)
Emphasise B2B SaaS product positioning experience targeting SMEs and enterprise buyers
Showcase sales enablement work: collateral, demo scripts, channel partner training at Leyard
Stress cross-functional collaboration bridging Product, Sales, and Marketing
Demonstrate both German and English proficiency for bi-lingual stakeholder communication
